title: Gene expression analysis for browning in murine fat tissues and liver fibrosis.
author: Bianca Hemmeryckx
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kbgcsjw

steps.instruction: Make sure portion sizes of murine tissues are appropriate for the amount of RNA the RNAeasy column (RNAeasy kit) can hold: -sWAT: 100 mg -GON WAT: 100 mg -Liver: 30 mg RNAeasy mini kit Qiagen Catalog #74106

Add 600µl RLT buffer (provided in RNAeasy kit) containing β-mercaptoethanol to each labeled 2 ml Lysing matrix D tube. Put on regular ice! b-mercaptoethanol Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #M3148-25ML Lysing matrix D tubes MP Biomedicals Catalog #6913100
Transfer tissues with an ethanol swapped forceps to the corresponding labeled 2 ml Lysing matrix D tube on ice.

Homogenize sample in the Fastprep-24 (speed: 6 for 40 sec; MP Biomedicals): push button (back Ribolyzer), take out first platform, put tubes on second, push 2nd platform in, put first platform on head of tubes. Fix head on rotor, turn until you hear a sound. Set speed. Press run. Take out samples by putting entire platform on ice. Then transfer tubes one by one on ice.
Homogenize a second time: speed 4 for 40 sec. Put samples on ice.
Centrifuge homogenized samples at room temperature for 3 min at 13,000 rpm (will give a nice fat layer for fat tissues so it is easy to separate)
Transfer the clear homogenate (45° angle, remove the supernatant even through the beads layer but avoid the upper white material) into a new eppendorftube.

Add 600µl ethanol (50% for liver tissues, 70% for fat tissues) to each tube containing the homogenates. Mix immediately by pipetting and transfer to the RNAeasy spin column (max. 700 µl and provided by the RNAeasy mini kit).
Centrifuge 30 sec at 10,000 rpm at room temperature; discard flow-through (50 ml tube).
Apply the rest of the sample and centrifuge 30 sec at 10,000 rpm at room temperature. Discard flow-through.
Add 350µl of RW1 buffer (provided in kit) to each column (take fresh tip each time).
Centrifuge for 30 sec at 10,000 rpm at room temperature.

Add 80µl DNAse I working solution directly onto the membrane (drop in middle of the membrane) and incubate for 15 min at room temperature (fresh tip each sample). DNAse I, RNAse-free Qiagen Catalog #79254
Add 350µl of RW1 buffer to each column.
Use a new tube to collect flow-through.
Centrifuge for 30 sec at 10,000 rpm at room temperature, discard flow-through.
Add 500µl RPE buffer (provided in kit) to each column.
Centrifuge for 30 sec at 10,000 rpm at room temperature, discard flow-through.
Add another 500µl RPE buffer to each column.
Centrifuge for 2 min at 10,000 rpm at room temperature, discard flow-through, use a new tube.
Centrifuge for 1 min at 13,200 rpm at room temperature.
Transfer the column in a new 1.5 ml Eppendorf tube and add xµl RNAse-free water (provided by RNAeasy Mini kit) directly onto each membrane (volume: sWAT, GON and liver: 30 µl)
Centrifuge for 1 min at 10,000 rpm at room temperature (fresh tip for each sample).
Keep DNA-free total RNA samples on ice and measure RNA concentration using the Nanodrop 2000C (Isogen Life Science)
Make a 10 ng/µl dilution with RNAse-free water of the DNA-free total RNA liver samples.

Make complementary DNA from the total RNA samples using the Taqman Reverse Transcription Reagents: per sample combine 5.725µl RNAse-free water, 2.5µl 10x RT buffer (1x), 5.5µl MgCl2 solution, 4µl dNTPs mixture (2.5 mM each), 1.25µl 50 µM random hexamers (2.5 µM), 0.4µl 20U/µl RNAse inhibitors (0.32U/µl), 0.625µl 50U/µl Multiscribe enzyme (1.25U/µl) with 5µl 10 ng/µl total RNA. Taqman reverse transcription reagents Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #N8080234 Multiscribe reverse transcriptase Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #N8080018 Random hexamers Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #N8080127 Multiply µStrip 0.2 ml chain Contributed by users Catalog #72.985.002
Put samples in a 2720 Thermal Cycler (Applied Biosystems)
Cycling conditions are:-10 min 25°C-60 min 48°C-5 min 95°C-+4°C

cDNA samples are applied in duplicate on the 96 well fast thermal cycling plate for each gene * Thermo Fisher Scientific ref. 4366932 Optical 96 well fast thermal cycling plates, 200 pcs Optical 96 well fast thermal cycling plates Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #4366932

Prepare the RT-PCR mix for each Taqman gene expression assay and ppiet samples on cycling plate: for one sample combine 5µl Taqman fast universal PCR master mix, 0.5µl Taqman gene expression assay, 2.5µl water with 2µl cDNA mix. * Thermo Fisher Scientific ref. 4364103 Taqman fast universal PCR master mix * VWR Filtertip 20ul max rec axygen 960 REF 732-0652 * VWR Filtertip 200ul max rec axygen 960 REF 732-0655 * VWR Filtertip 1000ul REF 732-0863* VWR ART/ REACH 10ul Pipet tips REF 732-2221 * Taqman gene expression assay A disintegrin and metalloproteinase with thrombospondin motifs 5 (ADAMTS5): Mm00478620_m1 Browning * Taqman gene expression assay Cell death activator (Cidea): Mm00432554_m1 * Taqman gene expression assay Uncoupling protein-1 (UCP-1): Mm01244861_m1 * Taqman gene expression assay Peroxisome proliferator-activated receptor gamma cofactor-1α (PGC-1α): Mm01208835_m1 * Taqman gene expression assay PR domain containing 16 (Prdm16): Mm00712556_m1 Steatosis * Taqman gene expression assay Cluster of differentiation 36 (CD36): Mm00432403_m1 * Taqman gene expression assay Fatty acid synthase (Fasn): Mm09253800_g1 Fibrosis * Taqman gene expression assay Tissue inhibitor of metalloproteinases 1 (Timp1): Mm00441818_m1 * Taqman gene expression assay Collagen type 1 α1 (Col1a1): Mm00801666_g1 * Taqman gene expression assay Transforming growth factor β1 (Tgfβ1): Mm03024053_m1 Inflammation Pan-macrophage markers * Taqman gene expression assay F4/80 (Emr1): Mm00802529_m1 * Taqman gene expression assay Colony stimulating factor 1 receptor (Csf1r): Mm01266652_m1 M1 or pro-inflammatory macrophage markers * Taqman gene expression assay Monocyte chemoattractant protein-1 (MCP-1): Mm00441242_m1 * Taqman gene expression assay Tumour necrosis factor-α (TNF-α): Mm00443258_m1 * Taqman gene expression assay Interleukin 1β (IL-1β): Mm01336189_m1 M2 or anti-inflammatory macrophage markers * Taqman gene expression assay Arginase 1 (Arg1): Mm00475988_m1 * Taqman gene expression assay Mannose receptor c type 1 (Mrc1): Mm00485148_m1 Housekeeping gene * Taqman gene expression assay β-actin: Mm01205647_g1
Cover plates with optical adhesive cover. Press cover firmly on plate. ABI prism optical adhesive covers Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #4311971
Keep plates at +4°C (same day run) or store at -20°C (run within next 5 days).
Allow plate to warm-up to room temperature.
Before running, centrifuge plates quickly at room temperature in a table-top centrifuge Sigma 4.15C (Qiagen)
Run plates on 7500 Fast RT-PCR System (Applied Biosystems):-95°C 20 sec-40 cycli of 95°C 3 sec and 60°C 30 sec
Transfer data to excel.
Put data together for each gene and each group.
Average Ct values for each gene and for the housekeeping gene β-actin.
Calculate ΔCt = Ct of gene of interest – Ct of housekeeping gene.
Calculate the average of ΔCt of the calibrator (wild-type mice) for each gene.
Calculate ΔΔCt = ΔCt of all experimental groups – ΔCtaverage of calibrator group for each gene.
Calculate fold change as 2^(-ΔΔCt) for all data
